title: Garlicky Molten Italian Fish Fillet Cacio E Pepe
description: A hangover-cure Italian dish featuring a garlic-infused, molten Cacio e Pepe sauce served with a tender and flaky fish fillet, made with shio-cure and no added sugar.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the cod fillets with salt and pepper.
Add the garlic to the skillet and saut�89 until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the capers to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until they start to brown.
Add the cod fillets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
Add the white wine to the skillet and cook until reduced by half, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the Pecorino Romano and Parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Return the cod to the skillet and spoon some of the Cacio e Pepe sauce over the top of each fillet.
Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
